title: Slow response times on payment gateway
description: Users have reported intermittent slowdowns on the payment processing API. Response times spiked to 3s for a few minutes but have since returned to normal. Monitoring shows no ongoing issue.

title: Critical Authentication Outage - Customer Logins Down
description: We are experiencing a critical authentication outage affecting all customer login portals. Users are receiving 503 Service Unavailable errors when attempting to sign in. The identity provider service cluster appears to be in a crash loop. This is impacting all customer-facing applications and is a revenue-critical incident. Immediate investigation and escalation required. Initial monitoring shows 100% of login attempts failing since 08:10 UTC.

title: Database replication lag on reporting instance
description: Replication lag on the reporting database slave has grown to 15 minutes, causing stale data in dashboards. DBA team is investigating possible I/O contention.
